code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_GradeSync] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {Education_GradeSync] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {Education_LMS_Portal] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {Education_StudentDB] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {Education_ClassroomService] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {Education_ContentCDN] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {Education_LMS_Portal] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {Education_ContentCDN] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {Education_ContentCDN] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {Education_StudentDB] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {Education_LMS_Portal] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {Education_ContentCDN] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {Education_StudentDB] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个教育场景下的智能监考系统状态机，核心是要能根据设备性能动态调整检测模式。先从AppInitialization开始，然后进入PerformanceAssessment评估设备能力。
明白，PerformanceAssessment之后是DeviceCapabilityCheck对吧？然后根据设备档次分流到四种模式：UltraFastMode给低端机、FastMode给中端、BalancedMode给高端、HighQualityMode给旗舰设备？
对，InitialModeSelection这个分支很关键。UltraFastMode里面要放QuarterResolution和BasicFaceDetection，主打极简处理。
好的，UltraFastMode内部结构我画好了：QuarterResolution → BasicFaceDetection → MinimalProcessing → LowBatteryUsage → PerformanceMonitoring。
FastMode用HalfResolution，加上BasicNSFWDetection做基础内容过滤。BalancedMode是我们的主力推荐，用FullResolution配CompleteFaceDetection和FullNSFWDetection，还要加上GenderClassification。
HighQualityMode这边我理解是EnhancedResolution配AdvancedFaceDetection，再加上ContentDensityAnalysis？这个模式耗电会比较高吧。
没错，HighQualityMode就是给旗舰机用的，EnhancedNSFWDetection和DetailedGenderClassification都要上，最后还有ContentDensityAnalysis分析画面复杂度。
四个模式都画好了，每个都连到PerformanceMonitoring。接下来是ContinuousMonitoring状态，里面放CPUUsageCheck、MemoryUsageCheck、BatteryLevelCheck这些监控项。
ContinuousMonitoring还要加上ThermalStateCheck和NetworkLatencyCheck，然后汇总到PerformanceDecision做判断。
PerformanceDecision分出三条线：PerformanceGood走MaintainCurrentMode，PerformanceIssues走DegradePerformance，ResourcesAvailable走ImprovePerformance？
完全正确。DegradePerformance里面要一步步降级：ReduceDetectionFrequency、LowerResolution、DisableNonEssentialFeatures，最后OptimizeMemoryUsage。
DegradePerformance画好了。ImprovePerformance这边是对称的升级路径：IncreaseDetectionQuality、HigherResolution、EnableAdditionalFeatures、ReduceCacheDependency、EnhancePrecision。
两个调整路径最后都汇入AdaptiveAdjustment，里面做ApplyChanges、TestNewSettings、ValidatePerformance、UpdateConfiguration，然后返回ContinuousMonitoring。
MaintainCurrentMode也是到AdaptiveAdjustment对吧？另外需要处理紧急情况吗，比如系统卡死那种？
要的，ContinuousMonitoring要有一条EmergencyMode分支，触发条件是CriticalPerformanceIssue。EmergencyMode里面做MinimalDetection、CriticalFeaturesOnly、MaximumCaching，然后EmergencyOptimization之后尝试GradualRecovery。
EmergencyMode加好了，恢复后回到ContinuousMonitoring。用户主动切换模式的情况也要考虑吧？
对，加UserModeChange分支。用户改设置后先ValidateUserChoice，然后ApplyUserSettings，如果不兼容就WarnIfIncompatible，用户确认后AcceptOverride。
UserModeChange画完了。电池优化和温控是不是也要独立处理？
是的，ContinuousMonitoring检测到LowBatteryDetected就进BatteryOptimization：ReduceProcessingFrequency、DisableBackgroundFeatures、MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks、EnableDeepCaching，最后进入BatterySaveMode。
BatteryOptimization完成了，电池恢复后返回监控。ThermalThrottling那边是处理过热？
对，OverheatingDetected触发ThermalThrottling：ReduceProcessorUsage、IncreaseProcessingIntervals、DisableGPUAcceleration，然后CooldownPause等温度下来，ThermalRecovery后回去。
ThermalThrottling加好了。现在各个教育模块的绑定需要确认：UltraFastMode对应GradeSync，FastMode对应LMS_Portal，BalancedMode对应StudentDB，HighQualityMode对应ClassroomService？
没错，ContinuousMonitoring对应ContentCDN。EmergencyMode和ThermalThrottling都绑StudentDB，BatteryOptimization和AdaptiveAdjustment绑ContentCDN，UserModeChange绑LMS_Portal。
需要给几个关键模式加注释说明吗？比如BalancedMode的推荐配置、UltraFastMode的极简参数、HighQualityMode的耗电情况。
好，UltraFastMode注明224x224分辨率、500ms间隔、每小时2%耗电；BalancedMode写原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%耗电；HighQualityMode写3000ms间隔、12-15%耗电，加上内容密度分析。
三条注释都加好了。整体结构检查一遍：从AppInitialization开始，四种初始模式，统一PerformanceMonitoring，然后ContinuousMonitoring循环，支持自适应调整、紧急模式、用户切换、电池优化、温控节流五个分支。
DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance的路径确认一下，它们都是先进入AdaptiveAdjustment，做完ApplyChanges那些步骤，然后返回ContinuousMonitoring对吧？
确认，AdaptiveAdjustment的闭环是Return to Monitoring连回ContinuousMonitoring。所有分支都验证过了，状态机完整。
